assessment.pageDescription: Determine if your product falls under the EU Cyber Resilience Act and its classification.

step1.title: Tell us about your product
step1.description: Basic information about the product you want to assess.
step1.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of your product's functionality…

step2.title: Does your product contain digital elements?
step2.description: The CRA applies to products with digital elements — any software or hardware product with a data connection, including remote data processing.
step2.yesDescription: The product includes software, firmware, or network connectivity.
step2.noDescription: The product is purely mechanical or analog with no digital components.

step3.title: Will this product be distributed in the EU market?
step3.description: The CRA applies only to products placed on the EU market or made available within the European Union.
step3.yesDescription: The product will be sold, distributed, or made available in EU member states.
step3.no: No, not for the EU market
step3.noDescription: The product is exclusively for markets outside the European Union.

step4.title: Is your product covered by sector-specific regulations?
step4.description: Products already covered by certain EU sector-specific regulations are excluded from the CRA scope.
step4.noneApplyDescription: My product is not covered by any of these sector-specific regulations.

sectors.medical_devicesDescription: Products regulated under the Medical Device Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
sectors.motor_vehiclesDescription: Vehicles and components covered by type-approval regulation (EU) 2019/2144.
sectors.marine_equipmentDescription: Equipment covered by the Marine Equipment Directive 2014/90/EU.
sectors.aviationDescription: Products certified under civil aviation regulations (EU) 2018/1139.
sectors.military_defenseDescription: Products developed exclusively for military or defense purposes.
sectors.national_securityDescription: Products developed exclusively for national security purposes.

step5.title: Select the subcategory that best matches your product
step5.description: CRA Annexes III and IV define specific product subcategories with higher security requirements. Select the most applicable subcategory, or choose "None" if your product doesn't match any listed subcategory.
step5.noneMatchDescription: My product does not fall into any of the listed subcategories. It will be classified as Default.

outOfScope.title: Product is out of CRA scope

reasons.noDigitalElements: Your product does not contain digital elements and therefore falls outside the scope of the Cyber Resilience Act.
reasons.noEuDistribution: Your product is not intended for the EU market and therefore falls outside the scope of the Cyber Resilience Act.
reasons.excludedSector: Your product is already covered by sector-specific EU regulations and is excluded from the CRA scope.

result.title: Assessment Complete
result.subtitle: Your product has been assessed and classified under the CRA.

categories.defaultDescription: Standard security requirements apply. Self-assessment is sufficient.
categories.important_class_iDescription: Enhanced security requirements. Self-assessment allowed with harmonised standards.
categories.important_class_iiDescription: High security requirements. Third-party assessment by a notified body required.
categories.criticalDescription: Highest security requirements. European cybersecurity certification required.

routes.module_aDescription: Internal production control. You can self-assess compliance with essential requirements.
routes.module_b_cDescription: EU-type examination (Module B) followed by conformity to type (Module C) by a notified body.
routes.module_hDescription: Full quality assurance assessment by a notified body covering design, production, and product checks.
routes.european_certificationDescription: European cybersecurity certification scheme as defined by ENISA under the EU Cybersecurity Act.

roadmapSteps.step1Description: Assess current security posture against CRA essential requirements.
roadmapSteps.step2Description: Perform cybersecurity risk assessment for the product lifecycle.
roadmapSteps.step3Description: Implement security requirements in product design and development.
roadmapSteps.step4Description: Establish vulnerability handling and disclosure processes.
roadmapSteps.step5Description: Generate and maintain a Software Bill of Materials (Annex II).
roadmapSteps.step6Description: Prepare technical documentation per Annex V requirements.
roadmapSteps.step7Description: Complete the required conformity assessment procedure.
roadmapSteps.step8Description: Issue EU Declaration of Conformity and affix CE marking.

errors.notAuthenticated: You must be signed in to continue.
errors.noOrganization: You must belong to an organization.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
